# Welcome Palace

> Luxury hotel, private banquet hall and in-house catering in Piplod, Surat, Gujarat, India. Known as the "Shadi Wala Ghar" — entire-floor family wedding stays where a whole family sleeps, eats and celebrates under one roof. A unit of TW Hospitality Services Private Limited, established 2013.

## Key Pages

- [Rooms & Booking](https://www.welcomepalace.in/rooms): 15 luxury rooms — Deluxe (₹3,500/night), Suite (₹4,500), Honeymoon Suites with Jacuzzi (₹5,500), Family Rooms, and the Pariwar Niwas family residence (₹11,000/night, up to 12 guests). Flexible 3h/6h/12h/24h slots.
- [Shadi Wala Ghar](https://www.welcomepalace.in/shadi-wala-ghar): Entire-floor buyout for family weddings — all rooms plus a private banquet hall, from ₹61,000 for a 60-guest buyout.
- [Banquet Hall](https://www.welcomepalace.in/banquet): Private hall for 125–175 guests. Weddings, Satsang, Haldi, Mehandi, Sangeet, corporate meets. Morning/Evening slots ₹18,000. Outside catering allowed.
- [Catering](https://www.welcomepalace.in/catering): Chandni Chowk Live Kitchen — pure-veg, live counters, heritage Surat flavours. Six plans from ₹650 to ₹1,850 per person.
- [About Us](https://www.welcomepalace.in/about-us): History since 2013, mission, cancellation policy, testimonials, location.

## Facts

- Name: Welcome Palace (TW Hospitality Services Private Limited)
- Location: 1st Floor, Chandni Chowk Complex, Near Surat–Dumas Rd, Piplod, Surat – 395007, Gujarat, India
- Phone: +91 80000 14410
- Email: welcomepalacesurat@gmail.com
- Rooms: 15 luxury rooms + Pariwar Niwas family residence (up to 12 guests)
- Banquet capacity: 125–175 guests
- Check-in: 2:00 PM · Check-out: 11:00 AM
- Concept: "Shadi Wala Ghar" — entire-floor family wedding stays
- Catering: In-house Chandni Chowk Live Kitchen (pure veg) or outside caterers allowed
- Payment currency: INR · 5% GST on all bookings

## Common Questions

- Does Welcome Palace offer in-house catering? Yes — the Chandni Chowk Live Kitchen (pure veg) from ₹650/person; outside catering is also allowed for a ₹3,000 kitchen-usage fee.
- Can a family book the entire floor? Yes — the "Shadi Wala Ghar" package books all rooms plus the private banquet hall; full 60-guest buyout from ₹61,000.
- How many guests can the banquet hall hold? Comfortable for 125–150 guests, up to 175 maximum.
- What is the cancellation policy? Rooms: free up to 48 hrs before check-in. Banquet & catering: free up to 7 days before the event.
